description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandals from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing. Upper Leather strap around the heel cup with an elastic front Heel strap attached to the toe separator Wooden beading along the separator TPR foorbed Outsole Durable TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip and traction Floral lug at the heel for ergonomic comfort and style Sandals care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
